title: EvalTask
description: A single evaluation task: a question about a codebase that requires executing code to answer.

question.description: Natural language question that requires running code to answer

target_repo.description: Name of the test repository to run against

gold_answer.description: Expected answer. Can be any JSON-serializable value.

gold_path.description: Qualified names of the functions that should be called to produce the answer

setup_code.description: Python code to run before the model's code (imports, fixtures, etc.)

validation.description: How to score the model's answer against gold_answer

notes.description: Optional notes about why this task tests what it tests
